_comment: POST /api/v1/pipelines/gitopsapi-v0.1.0/promote — promote to production (requires build_manager + cluster_operator approval on resulting PR)
_curl: curl -s -X POST -H 'Host: gitopsgui.podzone.cloud' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-Forwarded-User: martin' -H 'X-Auth-Request-Groups: build-managers' -d @pipelines/gitopsapi-v0.1.0-promote-prod.json http://freyr:8081/api/v1/pipelines/gitopsapi-v0.1.0/promote
